name: TRPG Runtime V2
description: Structured TRPG world-store tools for OpenClaw sessions (V2).

worldRoot.description: Optional absolute or resolvable path to world root. Defaults to extension-local world directory.

allowPatchApply.description: When false, trpg_patch_apply always denies writes.

allowedAgentIds.description: Only these agent ids may execute tools. Empty array allows all agents.

traceMaxEvents.description: Maximum retained runtime trace events per session.

panelDispatchTtlSec.description: Seconds before prepared panel dispatch is treated as expired.

analyzerMemoryTtlSec.description: TTL for analyzer memory cache; cache is non-authoritative.

behavioralDriftEnabled.description: Enable behavioral drift accumulation in analyzer lane.

behavioralDriftAffectsRules.description: Reserved safety flag. Deterministic rule adjudication remains drift-independent in v1.

anchorLifecycleEnabled.description: Enable deterministic anchor lifecycle tick layer.

anchorSummaryOnly.description: Keep anchor layer summary/projection-only without direct rule-path coupling.

richHookTextEnabled.description: Legacy compatibility switch for rich hook lane. Prefer richHookActionableEnabled/richHookWorldPulseEnabled.

richHookActionableEnabled.description: Enable optional rich text overrides for actionable quest hook slots.

richHookWorldPulseEnabled.description: Enable optional rich text override for worldPulse hook slot.

richHookRecentOutcomesEnabled.description: Reserved/guarded flag. RecentOutcomes rich lane is policy-blocked in v1.

hookTextTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for optional quest hook text generation. No retry; fallback is deterministic text.

hookTextCacheTtlSec.description: TTL for bounded quest hook text cache entries.

debugRuntimeSignals.description: Show raw drift/debug runtime signals in panel UI.

traceVerbose.description: Emit extended trace metadata. Default keeps bounded summary traces.

telemetryExtended.description: Enable extended telemetry projection in debug/ops payloads.

canonicalSyncEnabled.description: Enable runtime canonical sync provenance load at session bootstrap.

canonicalWriteBackEnabled.description: Allow canonical write-back targets in audited patch apply path.

worldRoot.label: World Root
worldRoot.help: Use only when workspace-based auto-resolution is not desired.

allowPatchApply.label: Allow Patch Apply
allowPatchApply.help: Keep disabled unless you intentionally allow writes from trpg_patch_apply.

allowedAgentIds.label: Allowed Agent IDs
allowedAgentIds.help: Restrict tool execution to dedicated agents. Leave empty to allow all agents.

traceMaxEvents.label: Trace Max Events
traceMaxEvents.help: Keep runtime trace bounded per session.

panelDispatchTtlSec.label: Panel Dispatch TTL (sec)
panelDispatchTtlSec.help: Prepared dispatch expires after this window.

analyzerMemoryTtlSec.label: Analyzer Memory TTL (sec)
analyzerMemoryTtlSec.help: Analyzer cache TTL; does not affect deterministic source-of-truth.

behavioralDriftEnabled.label: Behavioral Drift Enabled
behavioralDriftEnabled.help: Enable/disable drift accumulation. Rules remain deterministic.

behavioralDriftAffectsRules.label: Drift Affects Rules
behavioralDriftAffectsRules.help: Reserved in v1. Rule adjudication stays drift-independent.

anchorSummaryOnly.label: Anchor Summary Only
anchorSummaryOnly.help: Keep anchor layer summary-only (recommended v1 mode).

richHookTextEnabled.label: Rich Hook Text (Legacy)
richHookTextEnabled.help: Legacy compatibility switch. Prefer actionable/worldPulse flags.

richHookActionableEnabled.label: Rich Hook Actionable
richHookActionableEnabled.help: Enable rich lane for actionable hooks. Deterministic fallback always exists.

richHookWorldPulseEnabled.label: Rich Hook WorldPulse
richHookWorldPulseEnabled.help: Enable rich lane for worldPulse slot. Deterministic fallback always exists.

richHookRecentOutcomesEnabled.label: Rich Hook RecentOutcomes
richHookRecentOutcomesEnabled.help: Policy-guarded off in v1 to avoid accidental lane expansion.

hookTextTimeoutMs.label: Hook Text Timeout (ms)
hookTextTimeoutMs.help: Short timeout for optional hook text generation. No retry.

hookTextCacheTtlSec.label: Hook Text Cache TTL (sec)
hookTextCacheTtlSec.help: Bounded TTL for hook text cache reuse.

debugRuntimeSignals.label: Debug Runtime Signals
debugRuntimeSignals.help: Enable raw drift/debug values in Sub UI.

traceVerbose.label: Trace Verbose
traceVerbose.help: Include extended trace metadata for ops/debug sessions.

telemetryExtended.label: Telemetry Extended
telemetryExtended.help: Enable extended telemetry projection in debug outputs.

canonicalSyncEnabled.label: Canonical Sync Enabled
canonicalSyncEnabled.help: Enable runtime canonical provenance load loop.

canonicalWriteBackEnabled.label: Canonical Write-Back Enabled
canonicalWriteBackEnabled.help: Allow canonical file write-back in audited apply path.
